nodes.name: Rio Madeira stipplethroat
nodes.summary: Rio Madeira stipplethroat（Rio Madeira stipplethroat，学名 Epinecrophylla amazonica），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 潘多省
nodes.summary: 潘多省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联10种鸟类，包括Pavonine quetzal、Black-faced cotinga、Long-crested pygmy tyrant等10种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Rio Madeira stipplethroat (Epinecrophylla amazonica) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Rio Madeira stipplethroat (Epinecrophylla amazonica) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, and Peru.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: amazonica of the Rio Madeira stipplethroat is found in south-central Amazonian Brazil from the watershed of the Juruá River east to the Madeira River, in Peru's Department of Madre de Dios, and in far northern Bolivia's Pando Department.Clements, J
